channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-14 18:14 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Less than one hour until Falcon 9’s launch of Dragon’s 34th Commercial Resupply Services mission to ...
item.description: Less than one hour until Falcon 9’s launch of Dragon’s 34th Commercial Resupply Services mission to the@Space_Station. Teams continue to monitor weather, which is currently 10% favorable for liftoff at 6:50 p.m. ET →spacex.com/launches/crs-34

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink is the top reason to fly United. It immediately makes every flight ten times better *and it...
item.description: Starlink is the top reason to fly United. It immediately makes every flight ten times better *and it's free*.

item.title: @elonmusk: posting on 𝕏 30,000 ft in the air all thanks to@Starlink@United🫶
item.description: posting on 𝕏 30,000 ft in the air all thanks to@Starlink@United🫶

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk with NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang, Apple CEO Tim Cook, President Trump, Chinese President Xi Ji...
item.description: Elon Musk with NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang, Apple CEO Tim Cook, President Trump, Chinese President Xi Jinping, and members of the U.S. delegation in Beijing.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3 is better than people think.
item.description: Grok 4.3 is better than people think.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3 is next level. I've been using it quite a bit for everything.
item.description: Grok 4.3 is next level. I've been using it quite a bit for everything.

item.title: @elonmusk: Voice Cloning is now live via the xAI API! Create a custom voice in less than 2 minutes or select fr...
item.description: Voice Cloning is now live via the xAI API! Create a custom voice in less than 2 minutes or select from our library of 80+ voices across 28 languages to personalize your voice agents, audiobooks, video game characters, and more.x.ai/news/grok-custom-voices

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk doing Elon Musk things in Beijing 😂
item.description: Elon Musk doing Elon Musk things in Beijing 😂

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon completely stole the banquet 😂 He was already posing for someone else when Xiaomi CEO Lei Jun w...
item.description: Elon completely stole the banquet 😂 He was already posing for someone else when Xiaomi CEO Lei Jun walked up to his idol asking for a selfie Elon instantly poses with the funniest face does the same funny expression with Apple CEO Tim Cook too Now Elon became the MAIN attraction across Chinese media and the entire world 🤣

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0 is officially the most well-rounded agentic voice AI on the market right n...
item.description: Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0 is officially the most well-rounded agentic voice AI on the market right now It now ranks #1 in the latest τ-Voice agentic performance benchmarks in real-world tests on Artificial Analysis The gap is massive. xAI is quietly taking over every other model by actually building for real-world use instead of just lab demos...

item.title: @elonmusk: NEWS: OpenAI hit with Class-Action Privacy Lawsuit for Sharing ChatGPT Data with Google and Meta. Sa...
item.description: NEWS: OpenAI hit with Class-Action Privacy Lawsuit for Sharing ChatGPT Data with Google and Meta. Sam Altman's OpenAI secretly embedded Meta’s Facebook Pixel and Google Analytics into ChatGPT, turning your most private conversations about health, finances, legal issues, and confidential company data into ad-targeting data sent straight to Meta and Google without consent. This violates federal wiretap laws. OpenAI enabled surveillance for profit.

item.title: @elonmusk: Please don't use the offensive word "rape." It is Undocumented Love Making as I explain in Suicidal ...
item.description: Please don't use the offensive word "rape." It is Undocumented Love Making as I explain in Suicidal Empathy.

item.title: @elonmusk: Every American should be proud of President Trump’s historic and consequential trip to China. Glad w...
item.description: Every American should be proud of President Trump’s historic and consequential trip to China. Glad we finally have a leader who fights for American interests across the globe.

item.title: @elonmusk: Secretary Lutnick is a patriot at the helm of American’s $30T economy - the largest economic system ...
item.description: Secretary Lutnick is a patriot at the helm of American’s $30T economy - the largest economic system ever assembled, and deeply cares about investing in better design for Americans.@howardlutnick
